audit_items.proof_trace: nfp_port.c contains exactly one dynamic allocation: kzalloc in nfp_port_alloc (L222). On failure, the function returns ERR_PTR(-ENOMEM) immediately before any list insertion, so nothing needs to be freed. On success, ownership is transferred to the caller, which is responsible for calling nfp_port_free; all callers (nfp_app_nic.c, flower/main.c, abm/main.c) properly call nfp_port_free on every error path. No other dynamic allocations exist anywhere else in the file.
